name: robrain-monorepo
description: Institutional memory for AI coding agents — capture decisions, rejected alternatives, and rationale across sessions

scripts.docker:up: pnpm prepare-env && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up -d
scripts.docker:build: pnpm prepare-env && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env build perception
scripts.docker:up:build: pnpm prepare-env && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up -d --build perception
scripts.publish:npm: pnpm --filter @robrain/sensing-mcp build && pnpm --filter robrain publish --access public --no-git-checks
